zh.lifeSummary: Magnus Bengtsson是Bengt Magnusson和Mrs. Bengt Magnusson的兒子，出生在瑞典。他和Ragnhild至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1263年在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Magnus Bengtsson是Bengt Magnusson和Mrs. Bengt Magnusson的儿子，出生在瑞典。他和Ragnhild至少有1个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1263年在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Bengtsson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Nils, Erik, Gunnel, Kerstin, Lars, Per, Sven.  German Hans, Ulrika.
Swedish: patronymic from the personal name Bengt, Swedish form of Benedict . Compare Bankston , Benson , and Bentson .

variants.name: Bengtson
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Anders, Nils, Algot, Britt, Kjersten, Lars, Nels.
Americanized form (and a rare Swedish variant) of Swedish Bengtsson . In some cases this is also an Americanized form of the rare Danish and Norwegian cognate Bengtsen.

variants.name: Bankston
meanings: Americanized form of Swedish   Bengtsson  . Compare   Bankson  .
History: Andrew Bankston, alias Anders Bengtsson, came to New Sweden on the Delaware river in 1656; he died in Philadelphia, PA, in 1706.

variants.name: Bengston
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Helmer, Nels, Nils.

variants.name: Benedict
meanings: English, German, and Dutch: from the personal name Benedict, from Latin Benedictus ‘blessed’. This owed its popularity in the Middle Ages chiefly to Saint Benedict of Norcia (c. 480–550), who founded the Benedictine order of monks at Monte Cassino and wrote a monastic rule that formed a model for all subsequent rules. No doubt the meaning of the Latin word also contributed to its popularity as a personal name, especially in Romance countries. Occasionally the English surname may derive from Latin benedicite ‘bless (you)’, perhaps given as a nickname to an habitual user of the expression. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed the German variant Benedikt and many cognates from other languages, e.g. Hungarian Benedek , Slovenian Benedik (see Benedick ), and also their patronymics and other derivatives, e.g. Italian Benedetti .

variants.name: Bankson
meanings: Americanized form of Swedish   Bengtsson  . Compare   Bankston  .

nameMeanings.name: Magnus
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Latin byname meaning ‘great’, this was first extracted from the name of Charlemagne (recorded in Latin chronicles as Carolus Magnus ‘Charles the Great’) and used as a given name by the Scandinavians. It was borne by seven medieval kings of Norway, including Magnus I ( 1024–47 ), known as Magnus the Good, and Magnus VI ( 1238–80 ), known as Magnus the Law Mender. There are several early Scandinavian saints called Magnus, including an earl of Orkney ( d. 1116 ), to whom Kirkwall cathedral is dedicated. The name was imported to Scotland and Ireland during the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.description: King Eriksson died. Valdemar crowned King. Birger Jarl declared regent until Valdemar is of age.

historicEvents.title: Earliest Mention of Stockholm
historicEvents.description: The earliest known recorded history of the city of Stockholm is in Norse sagas as Agnafit which dates to 1252. The city rose to prominence due to Baltic trade. Stockholm is now the most populous urban area in the region.

en.lifeSummary: Magnus Bengtsson was born in Sweden as the son of Bengt Magnusson and Mrs. Bengt Magnusson. He had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Ragnhild. He died in 1263, in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Magnus Bengtsson est né à Suède, fils de Bengt Magnusson et Mrs. Bengt Magnusson. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Ragnhild. Il est décédé en 1263, dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Magnus Bengtsson wurde in Schweden, als Sohn von Bengt Magnusson und Mrs. Bengt Magnusson geboren. Er hatte mit Ragnhild mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1263 in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Magnus Bengtsson è nato il nel Svezia come figlio di Bengt Magnusson e Mrs. Bengt Magnusson. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Ragnhild. Morì nel 1263, nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Magnus BengtssonはスウェーデンでBengt MagnussonとMrs. Bengt Magnussonの息子として生まれた。彼はRagnhildとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1263年に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Magnus Bengtsson(은)는 스웨덴에서 Bengt Magnusson(와)과 Mrs. Bengt Magnusson의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Ragnhild(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1263년 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Magnus Bengtsson nasceu em Suécia filho de Bengt Magnusson e Mrs. Bengt Magnusson. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com Ragnhild. Ele faleceu em 1263, em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Magnus Bengtsson родился в местности Швеция. Его родителей звали Bengt Magnusson и Mrs. Bengt Magnusson. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Ragnhild. Он умер в 1263 г. в его родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Magnus Bengtsson nació en Suecia como hijo de Bengt Magnusson y Mrs. Bengt Magnusson. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija con Ragnhild. Murió en 1263, en su pueblo.

th.–Female: ถึงแก่กรรม
th.1182–Male: ปี1182–ถึงแก่กรรม
